mapper.select: select count(*) from stock_list.stock_list

select a.ts_code, b.name, b.area, a.pct_chg, b.industry_name_l1, b.industry_name_l2, b.industry_name_l3, c.main_business, b.market, a.total_mv, a.pb, a.trade_date from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code left join finance.fina_main as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where pct_chg > 9 order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.pb, a.ts_code, a.trade_date, a.trade_date, a.total_mv, b.name, c.com_name, b.market, b.list_date, b.act_name, b.act_ent_type, c.exchange, C.reg_capital, c.setup_date, c.province, c.city, c.website, industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code left join stock_list.stock_company as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code
a.pct_chg > 9
a.up10_count5 > 1
a.up10_count10 > 2
a.up10_count15 > 2
a.up10_count20 > 3
order by industry_name_l1,industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code, b.name, b.area, a.pct_chg, b.industry_name_l1, b.industry_name_l2, b.industry_name_l3, c.top_holder, b.market, a.total_mv, a.pb, a.trade_date from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code left join finance.top_hold as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where pct_chg > 9 order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.day_pct1 as y_pct1,c.day_pct2 as y_pct2,c.day_pct3 as y_pct3,c.day_pct4 as y_pct4,c.day_pct5 as y_pct5, c.day_pct6 as y_pct6,c.day_pct7 as y_pct7,c.day_pct8 as y_pct8,c.day_pct9 as y_pct9,c.day_pct10 as y_pct10, c.day_pct11 as y_pct11,c.day_pct12 as y_pct12,c.day_pct13 as y_pct13,c.day_pct14 as y_pct14,c.day_pct15 as y_pct15 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code inner join hfq_daily.`${tradeDate}` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code
c.day_pct11 > 9
c.day_pct6 > 9
order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.day_pct_origin1 as y_pct1,c.day_pct_origin2 as y_pct2,c.day_pct_origin3 as y_pct3,c.day_pct_origin4 as y_pct4,c.day_pct_origin5 as y_pct5, c.day_pct_origin6 as y_pct6,c.day_pct_origin7 as y_pct7,c.day_pct_origin8 as y_pct8,c.day_pct_origin9 as y_pct9,c.day_pct_origin10 as y_pct10, c.day_pct_origin11 as y_pct11,c.day_pct_origin12 as y_pct12,c.day_pct_origin13 as y_pct13,c.day_pct_origin14 as y_pct14,c.day_pct_origin15 as y_pct15 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code inner join hfq_daily.`${tradeDate}` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code
c.day_pct11 > 9
c.day_pct6 > 9
order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;
select a.ts_code,a.`close`,b.total_mv,b.trade_date,b.pb from hfq_daily.`${startDate}` as a left join common_daily.`${startDate}` as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code;
select a.ts_code,a.`close`,b.total_mv,b.trade_date,b.pb from hfq_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a left join common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code;

select ts_code,name,area,industry_name_l1,industry_name_l2,industry_name_l3,market from stock_list.industry_member
market = '主板' '创业板' '北交所' '科创板'

select a.ts_code,b.name,b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3,a.pct_chg,a.close,a.pe_ttm,a.pb,a.ps_ttm,a.turnover_rate,a.amount, b.market,a.total_mv,a.trade_date,a.up10_count5,a.up10_count20,a.total_mv/a.pb as asset from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a left join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code
order by total_mv desc
order by amount desc
order by asset desc
limit 100;

select a.ts_code,a.pct_chg,a.close,a.up10_count5,a.up10_count10,a.up10_count15,a.up10_count20,a.pb, a.down10_count5,a.down10_count10,a.down10_count15,a.down10_count20,a.conti_up, b.market,a.total_mv,a.trade_date,b.name,b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a left join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code
a.pct_chg > 9
a.up10_count5 > 1
a.up10_count10 > 2
a.up10_count15 > 2
a.up10_count20 > 3
order by industry_name_l1, total_mv desc

select a.ts_code,b.name,b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3,net_mf_amount,a.pb, a.pct_chg,c.buy_elg_amount,c.buy_lg_amount,c.buy_md_amount,c.buy_sm_amount,a.trade_date, c.sell_elg_amount,c.sell_lg_amount,c.sell_md_amount,c.sell_sm_amount,a.amount,a.turnover_rate,b.market,a.total_mv from common_daily.`20250612` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code left join money_flow.`20250612` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code
a.pct_chg > 9
a.up10_count5 > 1
a.up10_count10 > 2
a.up10_count15 > 2
a.up10_count20 > 3
order by industry_name_l1, total_mv desc

select a.ts_code,a.name,a.trade_date,a.lu_time,a.last_time, a.lu_desc,a.theme,a.status,b.total_mv,b.trade_date, c.area,c.industry_name_l1,c.industry_name_l2,c.industry_name_l3,c.market,b.pb from kpl_list.`${tradeDate}` as a left join common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code left join stock_list.industry_member as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.week_pct1,c.week_pct2,c.week_pct3,c.week_pct4,c.week_pct5, c.week_pct6,c.week_pct7,c.week_pct8,c.week_pct9,c.week_pct10, c.week_pct11,c.week_pct12,c.week_pct13,c.week_pct14,c.week_pct15 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code inner join hfq_daily.`${tradeDate}` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.pct_chg > 9 order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.week_pct_origin1 as week_pct1,c.week_pct_origin2 as week_pct2,c.week_pct_origin3 as week_pct3,c.week_pct_origin4 as week_pct4,c.week_pct_origin5 as week_pct5, c.week_pct_origin6 as week_pct6,c.week_pct_origin7 as week_pct7,c.week_pct_origin8 as week_pct8,c.week_pct_origin9 as week_pct9,c.week_pct_origin10 as week_pct10, c.week_pct_origin11 as week_pct11,c.week_pct_origin12 as week_pct12,c.week_pct_origin13 as week_pct13,c.week_pct_origin14 as week_pct14,c.week_pct_origin15 as week_pct15 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code inner join hfq_daily.`${tradeDate}` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.pct_chg > 9 order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.week_pb1 as week_pct1,c.week_pb2 as week_pct2,c.week_pb3 as week_pct3,c.week_pb4 as week_pct4,c.week_pb5 as week_pct5, c.week_pb6 as week_pct6,c.week_pb7 as week_pct7,c.week_pb8 as week_pct8,c.week_pb9 as week_pct9,c.week_pb10 as week_pct10, c.week_pb11 as week_pct11,c.week_pb12 as week_pct12,c.week_pb13 as week_pct13,c.week_pb14 as week_pct14,c.week_pb15 as week_pct15 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code inner join hfq_daily.`${tradeDate}` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.pct_chg > 9 order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.week_growth_rate1 as week_pct1,c.week_growth_rate2 as week_pct2,c.week_growth_rate3 as week_pct3,c.week_growth_rate4 as week_pct4,c.week_growth_rate5 as week_pct5, c.week_growth_rate6 as week_pct6,c.week_growth_rate7 as week_pct7,c.week_growth_rate8 as week_pct8,c.week_growth_rate9 as week_pct9,c.week_growth_rate10 as week_pct10, c.week_growth_rate11 as week_pct11,c.week_growth_rate12 as week_pct12,c.week_growth_rate13 as week_pct13,c.week_growth_rate14 as week_pct14,c.week_growth_rate15 as week_pct15 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code inner join hfq_daily.`${tradeDate}` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.pct_chg > 9 order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.month_pct1,c.month_pct2,c.month_pct3,c.month_pct4,c.month_pct5, c.month_pct6,c.month_pct7,c.month_pct8,c.month_pct9,c.month_pct10, c.month_pct11,c.month_pct12,c.month_pct13,c.month_pct14,c.month_pct15 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code inner join hfq_daily.`${tradeDate}` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.pct_chg > 9 order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.season_pct1,c.season_pct2,c.season_pct3,c.season_pct4,c.season_pct5, c.season_pct6,c.season_pct7,c.season_pct8,c.season_pct9,c.season_pct10, c.season_pct11,c.season_pct12,c.season_pct13,c.season_pct14,c.season_pct15 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code inner join hfq_daily.`${tradeDate}` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.pct_chg > 9 order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.year_pct1,c.year_pct2,c.year_pct3,c.year_pct4,c.year_pct5, c.year_pct6,c.year_pct7,c.year_pct8,c.year_pct9,c.year_pct10, c.year_pct11,c.year_pct12,c.year_pct13,c.year_pct14,c.year_pct15 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code inner join hfq_daily.`${tradeDate}` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.pct_chg > 9 order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.day_pct1,c.day_pct2,c.day_pct3,c.day_pct4,c.day_pct5, c.day_pct6,c.day_pct7,c.day_pct8,c.day_pct9,c.day_pct10, c.day_pct11,c.day_pct12,c.day_pct13,c.day_pct14,c.day_pct15 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code inner join hfq_daily.`${tradeDate}` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.pct_chg > 9 order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.day_pct_origin1 as day_pct1,c.day_pct_origin2 as day_pct2,c.day_pct_origin3 as day_pct3,c.day_pct_origin4 as day_pct4,c.day_pct_origin5 as day_pct5, c.day_pct_origin6 as day_pct6,c.day_pct_origin7 as day_pct7,c.day_pct_origin8 as day_pct8,c.day_pct_origin9 as day_pct9,c.day_pct_origin10 as day_pct10, c.day_pct_origin11 as day_pct11,c.day_pct_origin12 as day_pct12,c.day_pct_origin13 as day_pct13,c.day_pct_origin14 as day_pct14,c.day_pct_origin15 as day_pct15 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code inner join hfq_daily.`${tradeDate}` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.pct_chg > 9 order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.day_pb1 as day_pct1,c.day_pb2 as day_pct2,c.day_pb3 as day_pct3,c.day_pb4 as day_pct4,c.day_pb5 as day_pct5, c.day_pb6 as day_pct6,c.day_pb7 as day_pct7,c.day_pb8 as day_pct8,c.day_pb9 as day_pct9,c.day_pb10 as day_pct10, c.day_pb11 as day_pct11,c.day_pb12 as day_pct12,c.day_pb13 as day_pct13,c.day_pb14 as day_pct14,c.day_pb15 as day_pct15 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code inner join hfq_daily.`${tradeDate}` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.pct_chg > 9 order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;

select a.ts_code,a.trade_date,b.name,b.market,a.pb,a.total_mv,a.pct_chg , b.area,b.industry_name_l1,b.industry_name_l2,b.industry_name_l3, c.day_growth_rate1 as day_pct1,c.day_growth_rate2 as day_pct2,c.day_growth_rate3 as day_pct3,c.day_growth_rate4 as day_pct4,c.day_growth_rate5 as day_pct5, c.day_growth_rate6 as day_pct6,c.day_growth_rate7 as day_pct7,c.day_growth_rate8 as day_pct8,c.day_growth_rate9 as day_pct9,c.day_growth_rate10 as day_pct10, c.day_growth_rate11 as day_pct11,c.day_growth_rate12 as day_pct12,c.day_growth_rate13 as day_pct13,c.day_growth_rate14 as day_pct14,c.day_growth_rate15 as day_pct15 from common_daily.`${tradeDate}` as a inner join stock_list.industry_member as b on a.ts_code = b.ts_code inner join hfq_daily.`${tradeDate}` as c on b.ts_code = c.ts_code where a.pct_chg > 9 order by industry_name_l1, industry_name_l2, industry_name_l3, total_mv desc;
